name: Arjun Mehta
bio: We met in the first week of university and became close real fast. He is a backend dev in Bangalore now and we still talk whenever we can.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: She was my team lead at my first internship. Taught me a lot about writing clean code. We do virtual coffee catch-ups every month.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Known him since we were 8. We used to race bikes in our street. He's doing civil engineering now and we catch up whenever I visit home.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: We built our final year project together. She is doing her Masters in Canada now. Super resourceful person.

name: Rafi Uddin
bio: Met through a CP Discord server. We've done dozens of online contests together. Really good at DP problems.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Family friend who became a book club partner. We have totally different tastes in books which makes the conversations really fun.

name: Leo Fernandes
bio: Met at a 48h hackathon in Dhaka. We built a waste management app and got 3rd place. He keeps pushing me to co-found something.

name: Meghna Das
bio: Best friend from high school. We drifted after she moved to Chittagong but every time we talk it feels like nothing has changed.
